message:
fix(model): case-insensitive DependencyType deser (beads_rust-gcjz)

Same root cause as the Status/IssueType fix (beads_rust-enp5): derived
Deserialize with rename_all + untagged Custom variant was case-sensitive,
so inputs like "Blocks" or "BLOCKS" fell through to Custom instead of
the expected variant. This broke sync_equals comparison across JSONL
import boundaries.

Add custom Deserialize impl with to_lowercase() matching (same pattern
as Status and IssueType). Add proptest coverage for DependencyType
case-insensitive deserialization and round-trip.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
